programme.title: Ek Chalis Ki Last Local
programme.desc: Nilesh is a call centre executive who misses his last local train at 1:40 am. He meets Madhu, who also misses the train. Since there is an auto strike, they decide to take a walk. The duo then attend a bar that changes their life upside down.

programme.title: Do Knot Disturb
programme.desc: A man and a woman have to pretend to be a couple in order to salvage a CEO's marriage.

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: Barsaat
programme.desc: The actions of Sabarwal, a trickster in the guise of a high-profile businessman, lead to the death and imprisonment of innocent people. The affected victims decide to take revenge on the trickster.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
